name: Enable Compression
desc: Enables zlib compression for all subsequent packets. Sent after Login Success.

fields.name: compressionThreshold
fields.desc: Packets >= this size will be compressed. -1 to disable.

notes: After this packet, all future packets are wrapped with a VarInt uncompressed-length prefix. If length is 0, data is uncompressed.

implementation.overview: Enables compression at threshold. Modules: Disabler (detect compression change).
